title: Delhi High Court rejects Lalu Yadav's plea to quash Land-for-Jobs case
description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday dismissed a plea filed by former Bihar Chief Minister and Union Railways Minister Lalu Prasad Yadav to quash the land-for-railways jobs case against him and several of his family members. Justice Ravinder Dudeja said that the plea was devoid of any merits.Yadav moved the High Court seeking the quashing of the First Information Report (FIR) registered against him by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) in 2022. He also urged the Court to quash the chargesheets
